message:
fix(theme): project themes take precedence over global themes with the same name

Changes load_by_name_with_roots() to search project themes before
global themes, consistent with the project-over-global convention used
throughout the codebase (config merging, extension policies, resources).

Previously, discover_themes_with_roots() returned a flat iterator over
all theme files without a defined precedence order, so the first match
won — which could be either project or global depending on filesystem
ordering. Now explicitly searches project_dir/themes/ first and returns
immediately on match before falling through to global_dir/themes/.

Adds load_by_name_project_overrides_global test that creates a global
theme and a project theme with the same name ("shared") but different
accent colors, and verifies the project theme's color is loaded.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
